description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and large, industrial-style windows on multiple sides. The front facade is distinguished by two prominent arched windows on the lower level, a glass door with a wood accent, and a series of rectangular windows above. The side and rear elevations have a mix of large and small rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper floor includes a balcony with a black metal railing, visible from several angles, and the interior appears to be open-plan with visible furniture and shelving. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or painted concrete, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall structure is cubic and symmetrical, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and openness.
description: A modern, cubic house with a flat roof, large arched and rectangular windows, and a light-colored exterior. Features include a balcony, glass door, and open-plan interior visible through expansive windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large arched windows, a glass entry door with wood paneling, and several rectangular windows above.
description_view_1: Side view highlights a long row of rectangular windows on the upper floor and a large arched window at the back, with interior shelving visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a series of smaller rectangular windows and a mostly solid wall, with minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a single large arched window and the balcony railing, with a stepped building footprint visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Glass door with wood accent, flush entry, no porch or steps, minimalistic modern style
